type_definitions.name: FsTrackStore
type_definitions.description: Filesystem-backed TrackStore adapter. Wired in CLI composition root. After migration, the CLI still wires FsTrackStore at the composition root (CN-04); no change to FsTrackStore itself (OS-05). Recorded as a reference to confirm the adapter remains infrastructure-layer (secondary_adapter).

type_definitions.name: RustdocSchemaExporter
type_definitions.description: Infrastructure adapter implementing domain::schema::SchemaExporter and usecase::SchemaExporterPort. This track adds the SchemaExporterPort impl to RustdocSchemaExporter (action: modify, scoped by IN-06), which is an in-scope infrastructure change required so the CLI composition root can wire it as Arc<dyn usecase::SchemaExporterPort> into ExportSchemaInteractor without importing domain::schema::SchemaExporter directly. The existing domain::schema::SchemaExporter impl is unchanged (OS-05). The SchemaExporterPort::export_as_json impl calls the domain SchemaExporter::export method internally and serializes the SchemaExport result to JSON.

type_definitions.name: ConchShellParser
type_definitions.description: Infrastructure adapter implementing domain::guard::ShellParser, usecase::ShellParserPort, and usecase::HookShellParserPort. This track adds the ShellParserPort impl to ConchShellParser (scoped by IN-06) and the HookShellParserPort impl (scoped by IN-07). Both are in-scope infrastructure changes required so the CLI composition root can wire it as Arc<dyn usecase::ShellParserPort> into GuardCheckInteractor and as Arc<dyn usecase::HookShellParserPort> into HookDispatchInteractor without importing domain::guard::ShellParser directly. The existing domain::guard::ShellParser impl is unchanged (OS-05 applies to that impl); only the new port impls are added. Composition-root DI wiring is permitted under CN-04.

type_definitions.name: NullDiffGetter
type_definitions.description: Stub DiffGetter secondary adapter (implements usecase::review_v2::ports::DiffGetter) that always returns an empty file list. Used in the sotp review classify composition path that needs a DiffGetter port impl without actual diff I/O, so the CLI never imports domain types directly (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: NullReviewer
type_definitions.description: Stub Reviewer secondary adapter (implements usecase::review_v2::ports::Reviewer) that always returns an error when invoked. Used in composition paths that only need review state queries (status/check-approved) but must satisfy the Reviewer trait bound on ReviewCycle, without the CLI importing domain::review_v2::Reviewer (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: CodexReviewOutcome
type_definitions.description: Enum returned by run_codex_review_str so the CLI can emit review output without importing domain::review_v2::Verdict, FastVerdict, or ReviewOutcome directly (CN-01 / AC-03). Variants: Skipped (no diff files), FinalCompleted (verdict JSON + exit code), FastCompleted (verdict JSON + exit code).

type_definitions.name: ReviewV2Composition
type_definitions.description: Infrastructure composition struct holding all v2 review adapters needed for status and check-approved operations (uses NullReviewer). Fields are intentionally private; CLI callers access behaviour through the string-accepting free functions in infrastructure::review_v2::cli_composition so concrete infrastructure types are not exposed to the CLI layer (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: ReviewV2CompositionWithCodex
type_definitions.description: Infrastructure composition struct holding all v2 review adapters needed for actual review operations (uses CodexReviewer). Fields are intentionally private; CLI callers access behaviour through string-accepting free functions so concrete infrastructure types are not exposed to the CLI layer (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: CaptureBaselineError
type_definitions.description: Error carrier returned by capture_baseline_for_layer so the CLI can map it to CliError::Message without importing domain types. Newtype struct wrapping a String error message; implements Display (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: EvaluateSignalsError
type_definitions.description: Error carrier returned by evaluate_and_write_signals and execute_type_signals_for_layer so the CLI can map it to CliError::Message without importing domain types. Newtype struct wrapping a String error message; implements Display (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: TypeGraphExportError
type_definitions.description: Error carrier returned by execute_type_graph_for_layer so the CLI can map it to CliError::Message without importing domain types. Newtype struct wrapping a String error message; implements Display (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: SignalSummary
type_definitions.description: Signal count summary returned by evaluate_and_write_signals. Contains blue, yellow, red, total, undeclared_count, skipped_count, and catalogue_file fields so the CLI can print signal summaries without importing domain::ConfidenceSignal directly (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: run_example_demo
type_definitions.description: Runs the example track state machine demo. Creates an in-memory track, persists it via SaveTrackUseCase, derives its status, and returns a display string. Moved to infrastructure so the CLI composition root never imports domain types directly (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: persist_commit_hash_for_track
type_definitions.description: Persists the current HEAD SHA to .commit_hash for the given track (v2 incremental diff base). Encapsulates TrackId, CommitHash, and CommitHashWriter domain type construction so the CLI never imports them directly (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: append_scope_briefing_reference_str
type_definitions.description: Appends a scope-specific severity policy reference section to a prompt string. String-accepting variant of the CLI append_scope_briefing_reference helper; loads scope config without exposing domain::ScopeName or domain::ReviewScopeConfig to the CLI (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: build_check_approved_service
type_definitions.description: Constructs an Arc<dyn ReviewCheckApprovedService> that the CLI can call without importing infrastructure or domain types. Returns a ReviewCheckApprovedInteractor whose closure delegates to check_approved_str (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: build_review_v2
type_definitions.description: Builds the v2 review composition (ReviewV2Composition) with NullReviewer for status/check-approved operations. Discovers git root, validates items_dir path, loads review-scope.json, reads .commit_hash, constructs FsReviewStore and FsCommitHashStore (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: build_review_v2_str
type_definitions.description: String-accepting variant of build_review_v2. Converts track_id_str to TrackId and delegates. Callers that must not import domain::TrackId use this entry point (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: build_review_v2_with_reviewer
type_definitions.description: Builds the v2 review composition (ReviewV2CompositionWithCodex) with a real CodexReviewer for actual review operations (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: build_review_v2_with_reviewer_str
type_definitions.description: String-accepting variant of build_review_v2_with_reviewer. Converts track_id_str to TrackId and delegates. Callers that must not import domain::TrackId use this entry point (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: build_run_review_service
type_definitions.description: Constructs an Arc<dyn RunReviewService> that the CLI can call without importing infrastructure or domain types. Returns a RunReviewInteractor whose closure builds a CodexReviewer and dispatches via run_codex_review_str (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: build_scope_query_interactor_no_diff_str
type_definitions.description: Builds a ScopeQueryInteractor<NullDiffGetter> for pure-logic use (no diff I/O). Uses NullDiffGetter and a placeholder CommitHash. Suitable for sotp review classify which only calls ScopeQueryService::classify_by_strings (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: build_scope_query_interactor_str
type_definitions.description: Builds a ScopeQueryInteractor<GitDiffGetter> from string track_id and items_dir. Callers that must not import domain::TrackId or domain::CommitHash use this entry point (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: check_approved_str
type_definitions.description: Runs the full check-approved operation from string inputs and returns a ReviewApprovalOutput DTO. Encapsulates TrackId, ReviewExistsPort, and ReviewApprovalVerdict conversions so the CLI never imports domain review types directly (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: get_briefing_for_scope_str
type_definitions.description: Returns the configured briefing file path (as Option<String>) for the given scope in the given track's scope configuration. Lets the CLI layer query scope briefing config without importing domain::review_v2::ScopeName or ReviewScopeConfig (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: load_scope_config_only
type_definitions.description: Loads just the ReviewScopeConfig for a given track/items_dir without initialising review/hash stores or resolving the diff base. Used by string-accepting wrappers and the CLI composition root (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: load_scope_config_only_str
type_definitions.description: String-accepting variant of load_scope_config_only. Converts track_id_str to TrackId and delegates. Returns the scope config for use in the CLI composition root (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: render_review_results_str
type_definitions.description: Renders the sotp review results output as a string from string-typed parameters. Performs all domain operations internally so commands/review/results.rs never imports domain types directly (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: resolve_diff_base_and_getter
type_definitions.description: Resolves the diff base commit hash and returns a (GitDiffGetter, CommitHash) pair for sotp review files. Encapsulates domain type construction so the CLI never imports CommitHash or TrackId directly (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: run_codex_review_str
type_definitions.description: Runs the full Codex review cycle from string inputs. Encapsulates TrackId, ScopeName, RoundType, ReviewOutcome, Verdict, FastVerdict, ReviewWriter, and ReviewerFinding conversions so the CLI layer never imports these domain types directly (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: validate_review_group_name_str
type_definitions.description: Validates a review group name string without exposing domain types to the caller. Returns Ok(()) if valid, or Err(reason). Used by CLI to pre-validate --group arguments without importing domain::ReviewGroupName (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: validate_scope_for_track_str
type_definitions.description: Validates that scope_name is a configured scope for the given track, without resolving the diff base. Used by sotp review files to enforce scope name validation before any diff I/O (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: validate_track_id_str
type_definitions.description: Validates a track ID string without exposing domain::TrackId to the caller. Returns Ok(()) if valid or Err(reason). Used by CLI to pre-validate --track-id arguments without importing domain::TrackId (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: capture_baseline_for_layer
type_definitions.description: Captures the baseline for a single TDDD layer binding. Handles skip-if-exists logic, symlink guards, rustdoc export, TypeGraph build, and atomic write. Accepts track_id as &str so the CLI never imports domain types (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: refresh_one_layer
type_definitions.description: Refreshes a single layer: reads <layer>-types.json from the local workspace, computes per-entry signals + raw-bytes SHA-256, builds the document, and persists via the writer port. Accepts track_id as &str so the CLI never imports domain::TrackId (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: execute_type_graph_for_layer
type_definitions.description: Renders a mermaid type graph for a single TDDD-enabled layer binding. Accepts track_id as &str so the CLI never imports domain::schema::SchemaExporter or domain::schema::SchemaExportError directly (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: evaluate_and_write_signals
type_definitions.description: Evaluates type signals for a single TDDD layer binding catalogue and writes back to the configured file. Returns (ExitCode, SignalSummary). Moved from CLI so the CLI layer never imports domain::TypeCatalogueDocument, domain::TypeGraph, or domain::TypeBaseline directly (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: execute_type_signals_for_layer
type_definitions.description: Evaluates type signals for a single TDDD layer binding and writes back to the configured catalogue file. Moved from CLI so the CLI layer never imports domain::schema::SchemaExporter, domain::TypeCatalogueDocument, or domain::TypeGraph directly (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: validate_action_diagnostics
type_definitions.description: Prints action-baseline contradiction warnings and validates delete actions. Contradictions are printed as [WARN] to stderr; delete errors return EvaluateSignalsError. Moved from CLI so the CLI layer never imports domain::ConsistencyReport directly (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: validate_and_write_catalogue
type_definitions.description: Encodes and writes the per-layer catalogue after consistency validation. Returns the encoded bytes for declaration_hash computation. Moved from CLI so the CLI layer never imports domain::ConsistencyReport or domain::TypeCatalogueDocument directly (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: read_track_status_str
type_definitions.description: Reads and renders the track status as a formatted string from string-typed arguments. Moved from CLI so the CLI composition root never imports domain::TrackId or domain::TrackMetadata directly (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: execute_verify_adr_signals
type_definitions.description: Executes the verify adr-signals subcommand. Composes FsAdrFileAdapter with VerifyAdrSignalsInteractor at the composition root, runs verification, and translates the resulting AdrVerifyOutput (usecase-owned DTO, returned after T012 changed VerifyAdrSignals::verify from AdrVerifyReport to AdrVerifyOutput) into a VerifyOutcome. All domain type handling is internal to the usecase layer (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: any_enabled_catalogue_present
type_definitions.description: Detects whether any TDDD-enabled layer with catalogue_spec_signal opt-in has its catalogue file present under track_dir. Used as the Phase 0/1 gate: when no enabled catalogue exists, verifier returns silent PASS without consulting spec.json (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: format_finding
type_definitions.description: Formats a SpecRefFinding into a human-readable string for CLI output. Encapsulates domain::SpecRefFinding and SpecRefFindingKind so the CLI never imports those types directly (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: read_spec_element_hashes
type_definitions.description: Reads spec.json and returns a BTreeMap<SpecElementId, ContentHash> for use in per-layer catalogue-spec-ref verification. All domain type handling is internal to this module (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: verify_one_layer_formatted
type_definitions.description: Verifies one catalogue layer and returns formatted finding strings. Returns formatted strings instead of SpecRefFinding so the CLI never needs to import domain::SpecRefFinding or domain::SpecRefFindingKind (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: execute_catalogue_spec_signals
type_definitions.description: Core catalogue-spec-signals check logic with explicit, resolved parameters. All domain type handling is internal; the CLI calls this passing resolved PathBuf arguments and receives a VerifyOutcome (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: execute_catalogue_spec_signals_check
type_definitions.description: Executes verify catalogue-spec-signals after git-based branch resolution. Resolves the active track branch, then delegates to execute_catalogue_spec_signals. Returns VerifyOutcome (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: consistency_report_to_findings
type_definitions.description: Converts a ConsistencyReport into a flat list of VerifyFindings for VerifyOutcome. Re-exported so CLI test code can call it without importing domain::ConsistencyReport directly (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: evaluate_consistency_from_components
type_definitions.description: Evaluates bidirectional spec-code consistency from pre-built components (TypeCatalogueDocument, TypeGraph, TypeBaseline). Separated from execute_spec_code_consistency_str so the wiring can be tested without requiring the nightly toolchain (CN-01 / AC-03).

type_definitions.name: execute_spec_code_consistency_str
type_definitions.description: Executes the bidirectional spec-code consistency check from CLI string arguments. Returns a VerifyOutcome suitable for print_outcome. All domain type handling is internal (CN-01 / AC-03).
